title: Fine-Grained Distillation via Intermediate Homogeneous Block Leverage: A Paradigm for Efficient Learning with Scarce Data
description_es: Este trabajo presenta un nuevo paradigma de destilación de conocimiento que aprovecha bloques homogéneos intermedios para lograr aprendizaje eficiente en escenarios con datos limitados.
abstract: Knowledge distillation enables efficient model compression but struggles with scarce data scenarios. This paper introduces Fine-Grained Distillation via Intermediate Homogeneous Block Leverage, a novel paradigm that exploits intermediate layer homogeneity for more effective knowledge transfer. Our approach demonstrates significant improvements in data-efficient learning scenarios, enabling student models to achieve competitive performance with limited training samples.

citations.apa: Triguero-Lorca, I., Concepción, L., Wagner, C., Triguero, I., & Molina, D. (2026). Fine-Grained Distillation via Intermediate Homogeneous Block Leverage: A Paradigm for Efficient Learning with Scarce Data. (Under Review).
citations.mla: Triguero-Lorca, Irene, Leonardo Concepción, Christian Wagner, Isaac Triguero, and Daniel Molina. "Fine-Grained Distillation via Intermediate Homogeneous Block Leverage: A Paradigm for Efficient Learning with Scarce Data." (Under Review), 2026.
